issue_title: Mean.io favicon.ico isn't valid for IE
issue_body_preview:
This was brought up by @steezeburger in gitter.  It can be seen by visiting http://mean.io and also in viewing http://realfavicongenerator.net/favicon_checker?site=mean.io

Specifically it shows:
`favicon.ico seems corrupted or not in ICO format.`

This isn't a bug with the site's codebase, just the
test_description_zh: 在 Internet Explorer 浏览器中访问网站首页，观察浏览器标签栏上的 favicon 图标是否正常显示。
expected_result_zh: 浏览器标签栏应正常显示网站的 favicon.ico 图标，图标格式正确、无损坏，在 IE 浏览器中也能正常渲染，不会出现默认空白图标或加载失败的情况。
